SLN QR Attribution Dashboard

Sottovento Luxury Network · QR Routing & Attribution Engine

🚗
Driver Direct
ref= param
📱
Tablet Kiosk
tablet= param
🤝
Partner
partner= param
📣
Campaign
campaign= param
◈
QR Standalone
qr= param

SLN QR Registry

7 pre-defined QR codes for physical materials and campaigns.

QR Code
Business Card QR
QR-SV-001
https://www.sottoventoluxuryride.com/?qr=QR-SV-001&utm_source=print&utm_medium=business_card#booking
QR Code
Flyer QR — Airport
QR-SV-002
https://www.sottoventoluxuryride.com/?qr=QR-SV-002&destination=Orlando+International+Airport+%28MCO%29&utm_source=print&utm_medium=flyer#booking
QR Code
Flyer QR — Disney
QR-SV-003
https://www.sottoventoluxuryride.com/?qr=QR-SV-003&destination=Walt+Disney+World+Resort&utm_source=print&utm_medium=flyer#booking
QR Code
Hotel Lobby QR
QR-SV-004
https://www.sottoventoluxuryride.com/?qr=QR-SV-004&utm_source=hotel&utm_medium=lobby_display#booking
QR Code
Vehicle Interior QR
QR-SV-005
https://www.sottoventoluxuryride.com/?qr=QR-SV-005&utm_source=vehicle&utm_medium=interior_card#booking
Campaign
Google Ads — MCO
GOOGLE-MCO-2026
https://www.sottoventoluxuryride.com/?campaign=GOOGLE-MCO-2026&destination=Orlando+International+Airport+%28MCO%29&utm_source=google&utm_medium=cpc#booking
Campaign
Meta Ads — Disney
META-DISNEY-2026
https://www.sottoventoluxuryride.com/?campaign=META-DISNEY-2026&destination=Walt+Disney+World+Resort&utm_source=meta&utm_medium=social#booking

SLN Attribution Flow

1
QR Scan
User scans QR code with attribution params in URL
2
URL Capture
useAttribution hook reads and persists params to localStorage
3
Booking Form
Attribution data flows through all booking steps
4
Checkout
/api/checkout resolves lead origin via resolveLeadOrigin()
5
Stripe Metadata
Full attribution stored in Stripe session metadata
6
DB Record
Booking pre-created with source_type, source_reference, source_channel
